turns.source_text: Yeah I haven't felt anything in days. It's like I'm numb, I hate that feeling.
turns.user_message: I haven't really felt anything in a few days. It's like I'm numb and I don't know why.
Things that used to make me happy just don't anymore. I can't remember the last time I felt anything real.
I haven't felt a real emotion in weeks. I keep waiting for something to come back but nothing does.
